subcodes.first_line: O Mirza Muharram, who is known as Manzar, upon him rest the resplendent glory of Bahá'u'lláh! For some time, in this prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب میرزا محرم المسمی بمنظر علیه بهاء الله الانور مدتی بود که در این سجن
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
